steps: Start in a plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width.
Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Lower your body by bending your elbows until your chest is close to the floor.
Push back up to the starting position.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Send hips back and bend knees to lower down as if sitting in a chair.
Keep chest upright and back straight.
Lower until thighs are parallel to the floor, then push back up.
Grip the pull-up bar with hands shoulder-width apart and palms facing away.
Hang with arms fully extended and core engaged.
Pull your body up by driving your elbows down toward your ribs until your chin clears the bar.
Slowly lower back to a dead hang.
Place your hands on an elevated surface like a bench or step.
Align your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width, keeping body straight.
Lower your chest toward the platform, then push back up to lock out.
Support your body on parallel bars with arms straight.
Bend your elbows to lower your body until shoulders are below elbows.
Push up through your palms to return to starting position.
Lie face down on the floor with arms extended forward and legs straight.
Simultaneously lift your arms, chest, and legs off the ground.
Squeeze your lower back and glutes at the top.
Hold for the target duration.
Hold weights, bend knees slightly, and hinge at the waist until torso is almost parallel to the floor.
Let arms hang straight down.
Pull the weight up towards your lower ribs, squeezing shoulder blades.
Lower with control.
Stand tall with feet hip-width apart.
Take a large step forward with one leg and lower hips until both knees are bent at 90-degree angles.
Keep your front knee directly above your ankle.
Push off your front foot to return to start.
Stand tall with feet hip-width apart.
Slowly raise your heels off the floor, pressing down on the balls of your feet.
Pause at the top, then slowly lower your heels back to the ground.
Place forearms on the floor, elbows aligned under shoulders.
Extend legs behind you, toes tucked, raising your body off the floor.
Engage your core, glutes, and thighs to form a flat line from head to heels.
Hold the position while breathing steadily.
Sit with knees bent, feet flat on the floor.
Lean back slightly, keeping your spine straight.
Elevate feet slightly or keep them flat as you twist your torso side to side.
Lie flat on your back, arms at your sides.
Keeping legs straight, slowly lift them until they point to the ceiling.
Lower legs back down slowly, keeping core engaged and lower back pressed down.
Start in a downward dog position with hips high and back flat.
Bend your elbows to lower the crown of your head toward the floor.
Push back up until arms are fully straight.
Stand tall with arms extended out to your sides parallel to the floor.
Perform small circular motions with your arms, keeping them straight.
Reverse directions after the target duration.
Stand tall with a weight in each hand at your sides.
Raise arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Lower with control.
Start in a standing position, squat down, and jump your feet back into a plank.
Perform a push-up, jump your feet back to your hands.
Jump up explosively with arms overhead.
Start in a plank position.
Drive one knee forward under your chest, then return to start.
Alternate legs rapidly in a running motion.
Stand with feet together and arms at your sides.
Jump feet out wide while swinging arms overhead.
Jump back to the start position.
Start on hands and knees.
Inhale, arch your back, and look up (Cow).
Exhale, round your spine toward the ceiling, tucking your chin (Cat).
Kneel, sit back on your heels, and fold forward.
Extend arms out in front on the floor and rest your forehead on the ground.
Lie on your back with knees bent, feet flat.
Flatten your lower back against the floor by tightening abdominal muscles.
Hold for 5 seconds, then release.
Lie on back, bend one knee, keep other straight.
Tighten thigh muscle of straight leg and lift it 12 inches.
Hold briefly and lower with control.
Stand with back against a wall, feet 2 feet away.
Slide down the wall until knees are bent to about 45 degrees.
Hold for 10-20 seconds, then slide back up.
Sit with one leg extended and fold other foot against inner thigh.
Reach forward towards extended foot, keeping back straight.
Hold the stretch without bouncing.
Stand with back and arms pressed flat against a wall.
Slowly slide arms up overhead, keeping contact with the wall.
Slide back down to elbow height.
Stand in a doorway, placing forearms on the door frame.
Gently step forward until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Hold for 20-30 seconds.
Sit or stand tall.
Slowly tilt ear toward shoulder until a light stretch is felt.
Hold and switch sides.
Sit upright, look straight ahead.
Tuck chin straight back as if making a double chin.
Hold for 5 seconds and release.
Shrug shoulders up towards ears.
Roll them back and down in a circular motion.
Repeat forwards and backwards.
Raise one foot off the floor.
Slowly rotate the ankle in a circle.
Repeat in opposite direction and switch feet.
Stand facing a wall, place hands on it.
Step one foot back, keeping heel flat and leg straight.
Lean forward to feel stretch in lower leg.
Stand with feet flat on the floor.
Raise toes upward while keeping heels on the ground.
Lower back down.
